# kemp_config_route (Resource)

Manages a static route on a Kemp LoadMaster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_config_route" "example" {
  destination = "10.10.0.0/24"
  gateway     = "10.0.0.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destination` (String) **Required.** Destination network in CIDR notation (e.g. `10.0.0.0/24` or `192.168.1.1/32`). Forces replacement if changed.
- `gateway` (String) **Required.** Gateway IP address for the route.
